'''dhafubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetylmarsformoside|deacetylmarsformoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetylmarsformoside|deacetylmarsformoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhafubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæfibith|dhæfibith]] || [[word:dhæfibij|dhæfibij]] || [[word:dhæfibish|dhæfibish]] || [[word:dhæfibi|dhæfibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhafufubuth|dhafufubuth]] || [[word:dhafufubuj|dhafufubuj]] || [[word:dhafufubush|dhafufubush]] || [[word:dhafufubu|dhafufubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhafubuth|dhafubuth]] || [[word:dhafubuj|dhafubuj]] || [[word:dhafubush|dhafubush]] || [[word:dhafubu|dhafubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhafufbuth|dhafufbuth]] || [[word:dhafufbuj|dhafufbuj]] || [[word:dhafufbush|dhafufbush]] || [[word:dhafufbuf|dhafufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhafubuthu|dhafubuthu]] || [[word:dhafubuju|dhafubuju]] || [[word:dhafubushu|dhafubushu]] || [[word:dhafubuku|dhafubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhafubuth|dhafubuth]] || [[word:dhafubuj|dhafubuj]] || [[word:dhafubush|dhafubush]] || [[word:dhafubu|dhafubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhafubuthul|dhafubuthul]] || [[word:dhafubujul|dhafubujul]] || [[word:dhafubushul|dhafubushul]] || [[word:dhafubukul|dhafubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhafubuthuthu|dhafubuthuthu]] || [[word:dhafubujuju|dhafubujuju]] || [[word:dhafubushushu|dhafubushushu]] || [[word:dhafubuku|dhafubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhafubuthun|dhafubuthun]] || [[word:dhafubujun|dhafubujun]] || [[word:dhafubushun|dhafubushun]] || [[word:dhafubukun|dhafubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhafubuthuoro|dhafubuthuoro]] || [[word:dhafubujuoro|dhafubujuoro]] || [[word:dhafubushuoro|dhafubushuoro]] || [[word:dhafubukuoro|dhafubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
